summary: Weekly Heya operations meeting covering the June payroll discrepancy, a revised team proposal from Lawrence, and AI automation options for Sam.

tasks.title: Review June discrepancy report
tasks.description: Dean committed to reviewing the June payroll discrepancy report and getting back to Lawrence by Friday.

tasks.title: Send Sam AI automation options
tasks.description: Sam asked for the AI automation options for candidate screening; Dean said he would send them this week.

commitments_by_dean.text: Review the June discrepancy report and get back to Lawrence by Friday
Send Sam the AI automation options this week

waiting_on.text: Lawrence to send revised team proposal

decisions.text: Engage the external auditor for the July payroll run

risks.description: If the payroll discrepancy repeats in July there may be an underpayment liability issue

recommended_follow_up: Confirm the external auditor engagement before the July payroll run starts.
